title: Billboard Bluetooth Wireless Folding Headphones With Enhanced Bass, Controls, and Microphone - Black
description: These Bluetooth enabled wireless headphones syncs easily and quickly to your smartphone or tablet. A charging cable is included for fast charging. The convenient wireless feature allows you to move freely without being restricted by wires. Listen to music from any room up to 33 feet away. These headphones fold in for easy storage and travel.
features: The convenient wireless feature allows you to move from room to room without carrying your device with you while still being able to hear your music, with a range of up to 33 feet away. A 3.5mm audio cable is included with this item when you want to listen to music but don't want to use the Bluetooth function. Is ideal for outdoor use such as running as exercising.
These earbuds have a charging time of 2.5 hours and provide up to 6 hours of music and talk time. Easily answer and end calls thanks to the built in mic and controls.
Never miss a call because you can't hear over the music. Thanks to the built in mic, you can answer and end calls right from the headphones.

The headphones can be folded up when not in use which makes them ideal for storage or for travel when every bit of extra space counts. This feature also prevents the headphones from accidentally getting damaged in your bag.

reviews.title: Cute and functional
reviews.text:
Positives
1. The headphones are easy to adjust over your ears. Just a little stretch and readjust. You can wear it forwards or backwards.
2. Easy bluetooth connection. Connects easily and quickly when I turn it on.
3. Sound quality is okay.
4. A nice thickness that keeps you warm while listening to music
Negatives
1. The knot in the front has a thick seam which puts pressure on my forehead. It's uncomfortable the longer I wear it.
2. Medium to full volume level, other people can hear.
3. Micro USB
Nice for a warm headband but not great for my misophonia.

reviews.text: I kept losing my original buds for my beats flex earbuds i could not remember where i put the original extras that came with the package. First off they fit very tight onto the stem of the earbud. I dont think i am going to lose these. Second it comes with three sizes so it was easy for me to find the ones that fit the best. I intend to order more of the right size just on the off chance i lose one again which I doubt will happen.

title: 6 Packs(12 Pieces) in-Ear Monitor Replacement Memory Foam Tips 3mm Earplugs Earbud Cover for Balanced Armatured Headphone T-100(Medium, Yellow)
description:
Inner diameter: 3mm Outer diameter:12.5mmSize: Medium QTY: 6 pairs
NO EAR FATIGUE.
These foam earphone tips are softer than silicone tip material, Great elasticity and recovery make the tips perfectly fit your ear canal, very comfortable.
BETTER COMFORT
Slow-rebound material, uniquely breath-activated earmuffs activated by body temperature, gives you a new experience without irritation or fatigue.
PREMIUM SOUND.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
MORE ISOLATION
With the ear canal properly sealed by the earbud tips, you don't need to increase volume to enjoy music in a noisy environment.
LITTLE USING TIPS
Before wearing earbuds, squeeze the sponge tips with your hands, so they will automatically inflate and perfectly fit your ear canal after wearing. That will create better sound insulation. The memory foam is about 11mm high, the largest diameter is about 12mm, and the inner diameter of the catheter is about 3mm.Made of high-quality, environmentally friendly and non-toxic materials, it has the advantages of softer, slower rebound and more durable. Memory foam is characterized by a slow rebound effect, which can change its own shape with external pressure. From the perspective of earplugs, the ear canal varies from person to person, and the memory foam will change their shape according to the individual's ear canal, making them fit the ear canal best, thus achieving more than ordinary eartips cover good wearing comfort, better noise reduction effect, bring better listening experience. Applicable to the following earplugs: SE series:  SE110/SE112/SE115/SE210/SE215/SE310/SE315/SE420/SE425/SE530/SE535/SE846 E3C/E4C/E5C/E3G/E4G/E500/i3C/i4C/ SC series: SCL3/SCL4/SCL5/
features: 6 Pairs of replacement tips fit on 3mm cavity tube diameter for balanced armatured in-ear monitor.Please measure the outer diameter of your earplug cavity tube before purchasing, and refer to the picture to obtain the appropriate model.
The only earbud tips that adopt separate packaging; each pair is individually packed in its own little baggie; convenient for storage.
Not like other cheap earphone tips, these are high quality memory foam ear bud tips which would not fall apart or disintegrate.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
Before wearing, you may need to squeeze the ear tips and put them in your ear and they expand to fit. These are pretty stretchy and stay in place.

reviews.title: Big Lag
reviews.text: I use this headset for working from home, and every phone call is a struggle due to lag. I am constantly talking over people or being talked over by them. It's functional, but not ideal perhaps for phone calls.

reviews.title: Big Upgrade for me!!
reviews.text: These are fantastic!  I had a pair that pooped out in less than a year, I got these with my fingers crossed and so far they are a BIG UPGRADE!!! Voice clarity & noise canceling are great!  I work from home with 2 big dogs, it matters for me.

reviews.title: Very happy
reviews.text: I really like this headset.  I love the charging station as I often woukd forget to charge my last headset that was charged with usb cable.  My only issue with the headset is that the headband is not adjustable and I have a smaller head so the support bar sits a little low.  Very good connection and stays connected if I move around the house.

reviews.title: It Won't Charge
reviews.text: It worked wonderfully for a couple months and now it won't charge. I have switched outlets thinking it was my outlet. I also make sureits lined up in charging base. I loved it until it stopped working. Its a little pricey to only get 2 month use.

reviews.title: Comfortable for truckers and the office.
reviews.text:
I am a dispatcher and I have to wear a headset 8hrs a day. I can stand this one for about 6 hrs. before I need to switch ears. That is better than most headsets I have used. My office orders $300 headsets and this one can throw down with the best of them. The noise cancelation is excellent and the calls sound loud and clear. The Bluetooth connection last the entire 8+ hour shift. Once paired it connects seamlessly when I set up for my day.

Before you spend hundreds of dollars on a headset, give this one a chance. I am glad I did.

I hope this helps. :-)

reviews.title: These saved my ears! Literally.
reviews.text: My new Bose 700 headphones kept causing an allergic reaction to my ears and the skin all the way around my ears.  Like blisters, redness, swelling and SEVERE itching.  The first time, I wore them for an afternoon and it took 3 weeks for the allergy to be cleared up.  I then washed the cups of the headphones with a soapy wash rag and rinsed well.  The second time I wore them for just under 2 hours and again had a reaction that took 2 weeks to clear up.  I use another brand of headphones daily to watch TV (that I also purchased from amazon) and have never had a reaction before.  I found these covers and they have completely fixed the reaction issue.  I also ordered another brand of ear cup covers off amazon to try but prefer these.  I'll be ordering another so I'll have extras just in case 😉.

reviews.title: Does what i expect it to do
reviews.text:
I expect it to keep the sweat off the ear pads, and it does this.

But since it wraps over the ear cups, it does not allow the ear cups to rest nicely around your ears.
This means that it affects the headset's noise cancellation a bit.

Also, if you wear it for a prolonged amount of time, it hurts the ears and is less comfortable. I wear glasses and this exacerbates the tension behind my ears.
This is particularly for me with my glasses.

reviews.title: Reasonably comfy, but poor fabric quality and small sound hole.
reviews.text:
06/22/22. Revised rating down to 1-star. The fabric is awful, pills badly and attracts every bit of dust and hair. I stopped using these on Zoom calls because they look disgusting. See photo. This is what yours will look like after a few months.

----------------------

Fits my Yamaha MT5 headphones fine. It may make zero difference in sound, but I feel like the center hole is about half the size it should be. Not sure what they were thinking. I'd like to see to somebody make something similar, with thicker, more breathable fabric, and 1-inch hole.

reviews.title: Very big, but useful.
reviews.text: Very large, I was hoping for a snug fit. These extended further than the actual cushion.  So if you want to charge you will need to take off or just pull off a little. Still useful as I was tired of white peel off all over my skin and clothes. But definitely recommend for a bigger headphone.

reviews.title: Nice on the ears
reviews.text: Works great on my beats headphones

reviews.title: Great for TV
reviews.text:
So far the KBEAR Larks are the best sounding dual driver in-ear I have used. I have used them for listing music, playing and singing live and even watching TV. In comparison, I have about 5 different pair of dual driver in ears. These are by far my favorite.

Live music:
I use more expensive 5-8 driver in ears for playing live. I will say these don’t stack up against the more expensive in-ears but if I had to choose from this price bracket then I would choose these.

Great for TV:
Recently I tried all my in-ears(12 pair) for listening to tv. My parents often do this as they are hard of hearing and they get a much better listening experience with headphones. Therefore, I thought I would find the most well rounded pair for doing just that. These won! I preferred them, even over headphones that cost twice as much.

Listening to music:
These got the job done. I wasn’t amazed but they didn’t leave a lot to be desired either.

EQ:
Slightly elevated lows and highs. To me they weren’t harsh. They lacked some clarity but nothing sounded intrusive to my ears which tends to happen with other brands.

Pros:
-Nice packaging
-Quality case
-Somewhat a jack of all trades. Do many things well.
-Look stylish
-Fit my ears well
-Comfortable especially with replacement memory foam tips

Cons:
-Silicone tips suck. Replace with memory foam.
-My other 2 pin cords didn’t fit these.

reviews.title: Good value and monitor sound is good for music and voices.
reviews.text: I use these IEMs while singing with my church's praise team. The sound quality is good and allows good distinction of sounds without distortion or static. Connecting the wire to each ear bud was easy in comparison the other brand I had. I've not had any issues with them disconnecting. I also like the copper cord since it is more inconspicuous with colored clothing. The length of the cord is long enough to run down the back of my shirt and into the pack on my waistband. I am satisfied with this product and would buy them again.

reviews.title: OK IEMs
reviews.text: Work OK but sound quality not as good as other in ear monitors that I own in the same price range.

reviews.title: Great sound for a cheap fun IEM! Fake sloppy bass lol
reviews.text: The KBEAR KS2 are actually pretty great sounding! I was really surprised for the price on these the sound is really Bassy and fun. The dynamic driver 10mm produces some intense bass and deep lows that sound stunning and the balanced armature mixes almost perfectly together. Vocals are pushed forward a bit and mids are also. Kind of hard to explain I haven’t listened that much yet but compared to my Jade Audio EA3 they aren’t as professional sounding it’s more of a enhanced sloppy bass and everything is pushed forward more. Still a fun IEM though I would definitely recommend them given you get some different ear tips and a cord if you have an extra (it’s not horrible).

reviews.title: Cheap headphones
reviews.text: No proper manual, no mention of noise-cancelling

reviews.title: Just What I Wanted
reviews.text: I wanted to replace my old clunker of a boom box.  I needed a small CD player with_ a speaker so I wouldn't have to wear ear buds.  That's what I found here. At first, I wondered about the sound, but considering how small it is, the sound is fine.  I'm glad to have easier access to my CD collection.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth CD player
reviews.text:
I have a few CDs that I have kept despite mostly using streaming services. Music not available online. This device allows me to hear them again.
Connected very easy to my Bluetooth tailgate speaker.

Don't plan on using the built in speaker as I have several better speakers that I can connect to with cable or Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Sound Quality not the best on its own speakers
reviews.text:
I found using the Aux cable along with my Bluetooth headphones the sound quality is much better.
The headphones that came with unit wasn't that good.

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good
reviews.text:
My 13 yo son is on the vintage wave, so he has been using this and the cassette one. He is happy!
Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.

reviews.text: Product great
